---
title: "CV"
---

<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down"></i> [Download CV (PDF)](cindy_yu_cv_2026-07-01.pdf)

<object class="cv-frame" data="cindy_yu_cv_2026-07-01.pdf" type="application/pdf" style="width: 100%; height: 800px; min-height: 80vh;">

<p>Your browser can't display the embedded PDF. <a href="cindy_yu_cv_2026-07-01.pdf">Download the CV here.</a></p>

</object>
